commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And he spoke kindly to him, and set his throne above the throne of the kings that were with him in Babylon; Kings, who had been made captives. Adonibezec had 70, Judges i. Alexander kept Porus and Taxilus at his court, as Cyrus had done Croesus, whom he treated with great distinction. The prosperity of Joachin does not seem to have been of long continuance, as his benefactor did not reign above two (ver. ) or three years, Daniel.
